# jiki

> A lightweight, browser-based Node.js runtime. Write files, install npm packages, run shell commands, and start dev servers — all in the browser without a backend.

- Website: https://jiki.sh
- Documentation: https://jiki.sh/docs/getting-started/introduction
- GitHub: https://github.com/vorillaz/web-containers-lite
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/jiki

## Context Files

- llm.txt (summary): https://jiki.sh/llm.txt
- llm-full.txt (comprehensive): https://jiki.sh/llm-full.txt

## AI Documentation

- AI Overview: https://jiki.sh/docs/ai/overview
- Building an AI Coding Assistant: https://jiki.sh/docs/ai/building-ai-assistant
- Using jiki with AI Tools: https://jiki.sh/docs/ai/ai-tools
- Provider Setup: https://jiki.sh/docs/ai/provider-setup
